And no commitments cancel anytime, right? Your info starts now, right? Now watch, they checked either one now. This is important right here, okay? I said my whole philosophy was if I'm gonna sell someone something here, I'm gonna make sure they're like, that was the best deal ever. People, it's like an unbelievable deal. So 80, it was $897. It's like a joke. It's a joke. It's like, it's worth 10 times more than that, or 100 times more, right? So believe it or not, about 40% of the people who sign up also buy straight line fast track, all right? So what happens? Now this is not on a free trial. This they pay once. They have a 30 day money back guarantee. No one ever takes it, cause it's just a great product and it's underpriced, right? So buy people checking this, what happens? I get money today. Pace my advertising. So what I'm looking to do, I'm not looking to make money here. It's not about that. I'm looking to offset my daily ad budget. Congratulations, now notice here, now I have my upsell for a script builder. Now, most people, about 25 to 30% of the people who sign up will do this. So what I did is I need to make money, not cause I'm trying to strip people, like you guys know the script builder is the best deal in the world. So there's nothing wrong with an upsell here. So when I do it, I take a program that's $597, and I price it all the way down here, $197, I think $400, I'll say congratulations, right? Next up, you'll get access. So I want them to know this, and don't worry, you get into the membership. First, read this page for a special offer, the world's most powerful script building system. And first, I give them now a video and I explain about welcome to the program, and then I transition them into the script builder upsell here, talk about it right here, my benefits, right? Boom, boom, one call to action, two calls to action, right? And there you go, no thanks, continue to check out page, right? And essentially by doing this, I'm not looking to make a profit, but what ends up happening is at the end of the day between the script builder, the fast track, and people who take the one year pay, I'm able to at least break even on my advertising for the day, that's the key. So remember, the mantra we have here as a company is we want to give people massive value, like so they're fucking saying, this is just, what a joke, these guys are unreal, right? So that's why I price my things at a massive discount. Because I'm not stupid, I understand the straight line fast track is worth more than $98. I get that, I know it's worth more, right? I understand the script builder is worth a lot more than one man, I'm not stupid. The reason I price my stuff down is because I want you guys to say, you know what, everything about this is awesome. And in the early days when we didn't have our shit together, when everything used to disconnect, and there was always technical problems, right? Everyone would laugh and say, it's okay, we get it JB, it's cool, you're giving us so much value, it's okay that it's up, we know you're getting together, right? And that brought me the goodwill with you guys, that you put up with all the technical difficulties while we grew the company, just by giving massive value. So when you're thinking about your landing pages and your upsells and your bumps, so remember the difference, a bump occurs before they go and enter their credit card, it's called a bump, B-U-P, let me write it down. So a bump occurs before they enter their credit card. Once they enter their credit card, then you have what's called your upsell. And then you can also put a downsell in afterwards, I can say I can reduce the price of script builder if I want, if I wanna give it a shot to get more people and give people a special scholarship, so you can also end up with a sell here as well. Just remember, the key to success with this is that if you give people massive value, if you price your programs appropriately, people will buy them and say thank you and be loyal customers for the long term. If I did this and tricked people and I charged you like top dollar to everything or didn't deliver, it wouldn't work for the long term. So it's important that when you're going through this exercise here, ask yourself, what's my company represent? See for me, it's just about, if I could reach millions of people with my message, everything would be okay. Even if I don't make that much, even if I give away the store, as long as a lot of people find out about it, I'm gonna end up doing really, really well.
